app.name: VORTEX
app.welcomeHint: Cuɓo suudu walla cos heso. Jokkondiral gollata tawi internet alaa — ko layral nokkuure tan.
app.welcomeSub: Cuɓo suudu walla cos heso. Jokkondiral gollata tawi internet alaa — ko layral nokkuure tan.

auth.keyNotFound: Coktirgal suuriingal ngal konte yiytaaka. Naatnu e finnde.
auth.keyImported: Coktirgal naatnuɗo. Naattu suudu ndu kadi.
auth.subtitle: Pellital P2P mo internet alaa
auth.keyExpiredEnterPassword: Key timmi. Winndu konngol ngam @{innde kuutortooɗo}:
auth.confirmRemoveAccount: Ittude konte e doggol ngol? Konte ɗee e hoore mum njuumtataa.
auth.enterUsernameAndSeed: Winndu innde kuutortooɗo e konngol aawdi
auth.seedPhraseMustBe24Words: Konngol aawdi ina foti jogaade kelme 24
auth.invalidCodeOrExpired: Kod mo moƴƴaani walla mo timmi
auth.securityQuestionsNotConfigured: Naamne kisal kuutoraaka e ndee konte
auth.fillNameAndAllAnswers: Heɓtu innde ndee e jaabawuuli 3 ɗii fof
auth.seedPhraseWarning: Hisnu ɗeeɗoo kelme 24! Ɗe kolliraa tan ko GOOTO.
auth.seedPhraseHint: So a yejjitii konngol maa, ko ngol konngol tan waawi heɓtude konte maa. Winndu ɗum e kaayitaaji, resnda ɗum e nokku mo alaa ko bonnata.
auth.linkDeviceDesc: Naatnu ndeeɗoo kod e kaɓirgol kesol ngol

chat.waitingKey: Eɗen padda coktirgal suudu to tergal goɗngal
chat.waitingKeyHistory: Eɗen padda coktirgal suudu ngam ɓostude aslol
chat.keyUpdated: Coktirgal suudu hesɗitinaama. Paddo coktirgal hesral...
chat.encryptedTooltip: Binndol siifngol (E2E). Decryption ina waɗee bannge kiliyaneeɓe.

saved.noSavedHint: Huutoro doggol ɓataake ngam mooftude ɓatakeeji

settings.title: Teelte
settings.name: Innde
settings.fileTooLarge: Faayile ɓuuri fota. Ko addata 2 MB.
settings.geoFailed: Ñaawano goɗɗo waawaa yiide. Hoomnu GPS/Wi-Fi.
settings.geoTimeout: Sahaa yiide goɗɗo ɓooyi. Fewjeede e ɗo uddiraango alaa.
settings.speaker: Haaloowo
settings.ttlPrompt: Caggal balɗe noye golle ɗee poti momteede ?
settings.sqQuestion1: What was the name of your first pet?
settings.sqQuestion2: What city were you born in?
settings.sqQuestion3: What was your favorite childhood movie?
settings.sqSetupDesc: So a yejjitii password maa, aɗa waawi heɓtude naatde e jaabaade naamne 3. Aɗa waawi huutoraade naamne maa walla ɗe njiɗɗaa.
settings.sqFillAll: Eɗen ñaagii nde mbaɗtataa heen naamne e jaabawuuli fof
settings.pwReminderDesc: Ƴeewndo lewru — tiiɗno-ɗaa siftora konngol maa naatnugol.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Min mbasiyii ma kesɗitinde konngol maa nde naatata, mbele aɗa waasa naatde.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Laɓɓin cache media e dokke wakkati?

Kuutorɗe sifirgol e dottaaɗe MUMMATAA.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Session ina foti wonde ko famɗi fof balɗe 7 ngam waylude password.

Waktu heddii: {balɗeLeft} balɗe.
settings.waitDaysWarning: Balɗe 7 ɓennii tawo. Tiiɗno, ɗaɓɓu {balɗeLeft} balɗe goɗɗe.
settings.bmpEnabled: BMP ina softina — metadataaji ina ndeenaa
settings.sessionTooNew: Joɗnde ndee ko hesere no feewi (balɗe 7 ina ɗaɓɓiree)
settings.geoDeniedMac:
Heɓde nokkuure haɗaama.

1. macOS: Cuɓe Siistem → Sirlu → Sarwisaaji nokku → softinde feerorde
2. Feerorde : ɓuɗɗu e nate coktirgal e nder doggol adrees → Nokku → Jaɓ
3. Lowre hello ngoo
settings.geoDeniedOther:
Heɓde nokkuure haɗaama.

Ɓoɗɗu e nate coktirgal e nder doggol adrees → Nokku → Jaɓ, caggal ɗuum uddit hello ngoo
settings.autoDeleteHint: Mumtu konte caggal nde golle ɗee ngonaa

bots.deleteBotConfirm: Mumtu bot? Ngolɗoo gollal ko ngal waylaaka.
bots.noBotsCreateHint: A alaa bottaari. Sos bot e nder Cuɓe → Bots

fingerprint.aimCamera: Laaɓnu kameeraru to QR code neddo goɗɗo
fingerprint.emojiHint: Laabi fof foti yiide emoji goto. Ɓettoo e les ɗo ngonon walla e laawol salaake.
fingerprint.showQR: Hollu QR code faa neddo goɗɗo winndo
fingerprint.title: Jaɓde laawol
fingerprint.pointCamera: Toɓɓere kamera e kode QR goɗɗo oo

panic.callSettingsNote: Miil: Haala TCP e Relay mbaawi duumde kono njoganii diisnaare nayeeje. Traffic masking fewjude random e SDP sessions.
panic.desc: Hakkunde fof node ngoo haɓɓetee laaɓo. Golle ngoo mbaawataa artirde.
panic.warningBody:
Aɗa jogori halkude dokke kala haa abada.
Ngol gollal waawaa saaktude.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Batte ɗee fof ittaama. Ngolɗoo jonnde joofiima.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Sahaa laawol wuro keso tawaama — fendo kuuje fof maa (E2E encrypted)
privacy.backupHint: Uddu laawolji fof e konngol sirru ngu yoolno to server. Sahaa kuuje hewtaa — artir e kongol goɗɗo.
privacy.crossSignHint: Jaɓ kuuje keso e dokkal HMAC (suudu keblugol)
privacy.federatedHint: Faaru diital jokko encrypted nodes federation (mbaadi Shamir). Server yani tawo — artir e yoko peers.
privacy.historySyncHint: Jokko encrypted tiiɗe e kuuje fof. Server nanndi dewal tan
privacy.ktHint: Deftere rengannde tan jijjiruuje laawol yaltindi fof e silsilaare hash (Merkle). Server winndoo kala — faale mbaawi yiirde e laaral.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Nawru laawolji kuuje keso e kooɗi laabi 6. Laawolji hiinii e ECIES — server waawaa jaŋde.
privacy.ssssHint: Kewtu laawol master N ɓeydaaje e mbaadi Shamir. Ɓeydaaje M fof mbaawi artirde laawol. Kala ɓeydaago encryptiraama faa jokkordu salaake (ECIES). Server blobs encrypted tan yiɗi.
privacy.title: Siraare

contactSync.title: Yiytu jokkondiral maa
contactSync.desc: Ƴeewto hol e jokkorɗe maa telefoŋaaji gonɗe e Vortex. Limooje telefoŋaaji ina njuutee — serwer oo meeɗaa yiyde ɗe.
contactSync.noMatches: Alaa jokkondiral tawaa e Vortex tawo

errors.locationTimeout: Waktu nokku oo timmi. Enndu e nokku udditirɗo.
errors.noMiniAppUrl: Alaa URL Mini App kuutorteeɗo ngam ooɗoo bot.

keyBackup.passphraseMinLen: Passphrase ina foti wonde ko famɗi fof alkule 8
keyBackup.enterCodeOnMain: Winndu ndeeɗoo kod e kaɓirgol maa mawngol
keyBackup.invalidOrExpiredCode: Kod mo moƴƴaani walla mo timmaani
keyBackup.minTwoContacts: Ko famɗi fof 2 jokkondiral hoolaare e keerol ≥ 2
keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Naatnu konngol ngam siifde. Siftor ɗum — cellal tawa alaa ɗum waawaa.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Winndu konngol kuutorto-ɗaa nde sos-ɗaa jokkorgal ngal.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Mumtu jokkorgal key? Ngolɗoo gollal ko ngal waylaaka.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Woppude denndaangal geɗe teeŋtuɗe? Resndo e jokkondiral hoolaare maa won ko waawataa.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Kuutorgal maa mawngal maa feccee e N shares huutoraade skema Shamir. Kala M shares maa addan key recovery. Kala feccere ina siforee ngam jokkorde keeriinde hoolaare.
keyBackup.thresholdLabel: Threshold M (feccere ɓurnde famɗude ngam moƴƴitinde)
keyBackup.thresholdRange: Damal ina foti wonde gila 2 haa {max}
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Ko famɗi fof 2 peeruuji gollotooɗi e sifirde ina ɗaɓɓiree
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Mumtu jokkorgal fedde? Feccere e peer maa heddo, kono metadataaji maa majju.

botConstructor.title: Bot peewnoowo
botConstructor.subtitle: Mahde bot maa e gite — alaa ko haani
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Mesaas weltaare so kuutortooɗo fuɗɗiima bot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Jabbama! Ko miin woni bot maa. Huutoro /help ngam yiyde jamirooje.
botConstructor.notifyOnEvent: Fuɗɗotoo ko nde kuutortooɗo neldi mesaas
botConstructor.docsCommand: Jaabotoo so kuutortooɗo neldii yamiroore keertiinde nde (yeru /help, /start). Aɗa waawi ɓeydude laabi yeewtere ngam sosde kaaldigal laabi keewɗi.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Jaabotoo ko nde mesaas kuutortooɗo hawri e pattern. Huutortoo ko regex — yeru. "hello|hi" ina hawri e kelme ɗiɗi ɗee kala. Ko aldaa e senngo.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Huutortooɓe mesaas gadano oo njiyata ko nde ɓe puɗɗotoo bot oo e /start. Kala bottaari ina foti jogaade heen.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Nelda mesaas otomatik e dow doggol. Ina moƴƴi e siftorde ñalnde kala, digests yontere kala, walla anndinooje sahaa e sahaa fof.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Caɗeele ko logic bot. Ƴeewto waylo walla naatgol kuutortooɗo e jaabtaade no feewi tuugnaade e njeñtudi ndii.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot suɓotoo ko jaabawol gootol e nder doggol ngol. Ina moƴƴi e jeewte, wasiyaaji, salminaango, walla jaabawuuli ceertuɗi.
botConstructor.docsApi: Waɗde ɗaɓɓaande HTTP e API yaajɗo e huutoraade jaabawol e nder mesaas bot. Huutoro {data.field} ngam ƴeewtaade fannuuji jaabawol.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Nelda humpito to admin suudu so o fuɗɗiima. Nafoore ngam jeertinaango, humpitooji kuutortooɗo keso, walla ƴeewndo.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Ɓeydu laabi e bolol Yamiroore ngam sosde kaaldigal jokkondirngal. Kala taaɓal ina naamnoo naamnal, ina fadi jaabawol kuutortooɗo, ina hisna ɗum e mbaydi. Huutoro waylooji e nder jaabawol cakkitiingol e {Innde waylooji}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Huutoro jokkorgal {variable} e nder binndol jaabawol ngam naatnude nafooje diinaaji. Waɗde, waylooji ngonka ina keddii e nder mesasuuji ɗii.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Waɗde, mbayliiguuji mahraaɗi ina tawee e kala jaabawol:
botConstructor.docsVarIsAdmin: Goonga so tawii kuutortooɗo ko admin/jom
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: Aɗa waawi huutoraade mbaydi nanndundi e HTML e nder jaabawuuli:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Fuɗɗoraade e bolol Welcome — ko ɗum woni ko huutortooɓe njiyata gadano
botConstructor.docsTip2: Ɓeydu yamiroore /help limtoore yamirooje keɓaaɗe ɗee kala
botConstructor.docsTip3: Huutoro laabi yeewtere ngam winnditaade, wiɗtooji, walla mooftude dokke
botConstructor.docsTip4: Hawru e bolokaaji Sarɗiiji e waylooji ngam branching smart
botConstructor.docsTip5: Fotndu bot maa e haaldude e mum e nder suudu caggal nde njuɓɓinaa

gravitixDocs.title: Ƴeewndo ɗemngal Gravitix
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Ɗemngal binndol toowngal ngam mahde botuuji. 96 sifaaji. Backend Rust.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix ko ɗemngal keeringal domen (DSL) peewniraangal gila e leydi ngam winndude botuuji Vortex. Ɗo ɗemɗe goɗɗe njiɗi defte, noddaango, e boilerplate, Gravitix ina rokka on jokkondire kewuuji, jokkondire jeewte, e ngonka mahaaɗo — fof e nder sintaksis laaɓɗo, janngeteeɗo mo Rust jibini.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Janngeteeɗo — kode janngetee ko no anniya nii, wonaa masiŋaaji
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Safe — sifaaji static ina nannga majjere hade waktu dogdu
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Kollitgol — doggol, gardeeji, e jokkondire pattern ina mahaa
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal — alaa kilaas, alaa ndonu, alaa kaɓirɗe ngam janngude
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix ko kala jiɗɗo mahde bot Vortex e yaawre — so tawii a meeɗaa winndude kode ko adii, walla aɗa woni ƴellitoowo keɓtinaaɗo mo suusaa Python boilerplate. Ndeeɗoo tuugnorgal ina janngina Gravitix gila e kuule gadane : alaa ko ɗaɓɓi e humpito ko adii ɗuum.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Taƴre kala ina mahi e ko adii. So tawii ko a keso e porogaraam, janngu gila dow haa les. So tawii aɗa anndi ɗemngal goɗngal, huutoro tabalde ndee ngam diwde to bannge ko nafata ma.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Laawol ɓurngol yaawde gila e zero haa e bot dogdu.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on /start { ... } — sifotoo ko jokkorgal dogata so kuutortooɗo neldii /start. emit "..." — neldata ko mesaas feewde e kuutortooɗo oo. {ctx.first_name} — ina waɗa innde kuutortooɗo e nder doggol ngol.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: E nder IDE Gravitix, ɓuɗɗu e butoŋ Doggol e nder barme dow. Naat Token Bot Vortex maa so aɗa naamnee. Bot oo fuɗɗotoo ɗoon e ɗoon — alaa ko haani e mahngo.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Kala porogaraam Gravitix ina mahiraa e mbaydiiji tati : jokkondire, konnguɗi emit, e logic.
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Kala nafoore e nder Gravitix ina jogii sifaa. Siistem sifaa oo ko static : sifaaji ɗii ƴeewtetee ko e sahaa compile, hade bot maa dogaade.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Gollotooɓe ina kawra e nafooje ngam feewnude nafooje kese.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Koolondiral e nder Gravitix ko binndol UTF-8. Ɓe mballita ko e interpolation alɗuɗo e suite golle mahraaɗe.
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Pattern-match nafoore e dow patternuuji keewɗi. Miijo-ɗee ko haala switch doole.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Golle ko bolokaaji kod kuutorteeɗi kadi. Ɓe mballa ma e woɗɗitaade e waɗde kodde ɓurɗe weeɓde faamde.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Hakkundeeji ko ɓernde bot Gravitix. Kala golloowo ina heɗoo sifaa kewu keeriiɗo, ina doga so ndeen kewu waɗii.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Gardiiɗo ina ɗaɓɓi ɓeydude sarɗi e handler. Handler oo ina doga tan so garde oo ƴeewtiima to goonga.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Geɗel ctx ngel ina tawee e nder kala golloowo. Ina waɗi kabaruuji jowitiiɗi e mesaas jooni oo e kuutortooɗo nelduɗo ɗum oo.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: State ina addana bot maa siftorde geɗe hakkunde mesasuuji. So dowla alaa, kala mesaas ina jogii hoore mum, bot oo alaa ciimtol.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Flows ina addana-ma winndude jeewte keewɗe e mbaadi lineer, janngeteendi. Doggol ina waawi dartaade e faddaade mesaas kuutortooɗo garoowo.
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Neldude mesasuuji ko yaltoore adannde bot.
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Doggo kode otomatik e dow doggol — alaa golle cron, alaa sarwisaaji yaajɗi ina njiɗaa.
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: at — doggudu e waktu keeriiɗo e ñalawma
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Golloowo pipe |> ina rokka nafoore hono hujja gadano e gollal garowal. Ina waɗa golle caɗeele janngeteeɗe, nano haa ñaamo.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix ina rokka njuɓɓudi majjere e ƴeewndo / nanngude / joofnirde bolokaaji.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Structs ina addana-ma renndinde dokke jokkondirɗe e les sifaa inniraaɗo. Enums ina siftina denndaangal mbaydiiji udditiiɗi.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix ina nelda defterdu hiisawal kuuɓtodinndu e ~180 golle.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix ina jogii sifaa kuuɓtodinɗo native — ko mbaydi 64-bit floats lomtotooɗi geɗe goonga e miijo.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix ina waɗi hiisaaji limooje : derivatives e integrals hiisaaɗi e golle arbitraire.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Aljebra lineer ɗum hiisawal vektooruuji e matriks.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Miijo limle ina jannga sifaaji limle. Fooyre kriptogaraafi jamaanu.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Limle ina ndokka kuutorɗe ngam siftinde, ƴeewtaade, e ƴettude ciimtol e nder dokke.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Kuuɗe keertiiɗe ko kuutorɗe pottitte ceertuɗe teeŋtuɗe.
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Waylo-waylo Fourier ina ustoo maande e nder njuuteendi mum.
gravitixDocs.bp1: Waɗde sahaa kala jogo ko anndaaka
gravitixDocs.bp3: Huutoro gardeeji e nokkuuji if-chains ngam yamiroore
gravitixDocs.bp5: Huutoroo ngartam ko yaawi ngam ustude ɓuuɓri
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Laawol ɓurngol moƴƴude ngam janngude Gravitix ko mahde. Fuɗɗoraade e bot echo koolaaɗo, caggal ɗuum ɓeydu state, caggal ɗuum ɓeydu flows. Kala miijo keso ngo njanngu-ɗaa ina uddita baawɗe goɗɗe.
